Careers

As a designer and manufacturer of standard and custom specialty fiber optic assemblies, we look for employees who are as unique as our products. Our team is innovative, skilled, creative, motivated and able to work in a fast-paced environment. We are always looking to expand and welcome your interest.

To apply for a position at FTO, please submit your resume by email to info@fto.ca
